_comment: Authored by Claude. Daemon reads this on every loop. Update whenever thesis changes — daemon picks up within one tick. No numeric cap on alert count — every alert must be actively useful NOW (would you act on it with real money if it fires in the next hour?). Stale = remove. Signal-only / REMOTE / low-probability = remove.
pruned_by: 12:54 UTC tick — 10 news_flash events (1 stale iran_ceasefire Apr 21 Democracy Now 'highly unlikely' pre-dating actual indefinite extension; 9 Touska/blockade dupes Apr 19-20). Broker $1000/0 matches. 1 WebSearch (CNN live, ABC live, ksat, CNBC, Wikipedia '2026 Strait of Hormuz crisis'): MATERIAL ESCALATION — IRGC SEIZED 2 ships today (MSC Francesca + Epaminondas) transferred to Iranian waters + fired on 3rd container ship causing 'heavy bridge damage'. Step-up from 'fire, no casualties' (prior weak driver) to physical ship seizures (tit-for-tat asymmetric response to US Touska seizure). Trump re-affirms blockade continues. No fresh price pull (budget). Prior 12:42 UTC tape still stands as reference: GOLD 4747.16 (27p below 4775 reject), OIL 90.758 (near day hi 91.177 — break above now has stronger fundamental backing with 2-ship seizures), USDJPY 159.312, AUDUSD 0.71468, BTC 78204 (+3.28%). 1 alert MODIFY (gold: add 2-ship seizure catalyst — lifts conviction if 4775 tagged on continuation), 2 KEEP (audusd/usdjpy price refs valid). 9 structure_watch KEEP. 8 queries KEEP (iran_ceasefire already TUNED 11:38 for this scenario).

level_alerts.note: buy AUDUSD 0.707 support on Iran-escalation spike — live 12:42 UTC 0.71468 (-9.7p vs 11:21 0.71565, 74.7p above zone; drift lower continuing but nowhere near trigger). Indefinite ceasefire extension narrative intact (Reuters/NYT/DetNews/AJ 4-source verified). Spike to 0.707 requires fresh Hormuz strike escalation (ongoing — Apr 22 07:55 IRGC gunboat fire on container ship per ksat/nbcnews/armyrecognition, but no casualties so weak driver) OR formal Iran walkout. BTC +3.28% today signals risk-ON continuing which WEAKENS AUDUSD-spike-to-0.707 thesis (risk-on = AUD bid not sold). Wait for rejection wick on 0.707 touch + risk-off confirmation; skip naked breaks. SL 0.703, TP 0.7187 on confirmation.
level_alerts.proximity: 74.7p above 0.707 buy zone (live 12:42 UTC 0.71468 bid). Drifted -9.7p vs 11:21. BTC+3.28% risk-on contradicts spike-to-support thesis.

level_alerts.note: sell USDJPY 160.00 intervention red-line fade — live ~15:50 UTC 158.95 (-36.2p vs 12:42 159.312, now 105p below 160). JPY strengthening on lower oil + diplomatic hopes (tradingeconomics/forex.com Apr 22). Setup still structurally valid but level is drifting further away — no trigger imminent. Counterfactual hit_rate 100% at 1h+4h (1 fire, thin). Short ONLY on rejection wick at 160.00 + verbal-intervention confirm; skip naked breaks. SL 160.50, TP 158.50 R:R ~3:1.
level_alerts.proximity: 105p below 160.00 intervention red line (live 15:50 UTC 158.95). Drifted -36.2p further away since 12:42 — low-energy JPY bid continuing.

level_alerts.note: MODIFIED 15:50 UTC — buy GOLD 4775 breakout. Live ref ~15:50 UTC 4759.11 (+11.95p vs 12:42 4747.16, now 15.89p below trigger). Day range likely 4715-4775 zone intact. **CATALYST: IRGC SEIZED 2 ships today — MSC Francesca + Epaminondas — plus fired on 3rd 'Euphoria' (Fars/Mehr via Euronews/CBS/NBC Apr 22). Trump indefinite extension intact; Iran second-round talks remain on hold. Narrative unchanged past 3h — no fresh escalation rung, just confirmations.** Gold creeping toward 4775 on the seizure catalyst but hasn't broken. If 4775 tagged: wait for M15 BOS up + no rejection wick (spike-fade pattern burned us earlier today at 4772.24 reject). Aggressive LIMIT 4735-4740 still OK — seizure floor intact. SL 4730, TP1 4810, TP2 4850. Conv 3 currently → 4 on tag with CONFIRMED continuation (tighter bar given prior reject).
level_alerts.proximity: 15.89p below 4775 buy trigger (ref 15:50 UTC 4759.11). +11.95p drift toward level since 12:42. Narrative static: same 2-ship seizure, no new rung.
